entity.summary: Protocol-native decentralized exchange built into the Stellar network, supporting order-book offers, path payments, and liquidity-pool trading directly through the ledger rather than a single custodial operator or frontend.
entity.notes: HEI models the protocol-native Stellar DEX, its order books, liquidity pools, and path-payment exchange mechanics as one entity. Wallets and trading frontends using the Stellar DEX are not automatically separate exchange entities.

evidence.title: Stellar decentralized exchange documentation
evidence.notes: Current first-party documentation describes the built-in Stellar decentralized exchange, order books, offers, liquidity pools, and path-payment conversion mechanics.

evidence.title: Stellar DEX active market data
evidence.notes: Independent Stellar ledger explorer exposes current DEX markets, order books, and trading activity, corroborating active operation.
